content: Cristiano Ronaldo is the all-time UEFA Champions League top goalscorer with 140 official goals.
Lionel Messi led Argentina to victory in the 2022 FIFA World Cup, winning the Golden Ball award.
Lionel Messi holds the historical record with 8 Ballon d'Or awards. Cristiano Ronaldo has won 5.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won league trophies in England (Premier League), Spain (La Liga), and Italy (Serie A).
Lionel Messi holds the record for most official assists in football history, exceeding 360 assists.
Lionel Messi won Olympic Gold with Argentina at the 2008 Beijing Olympics.
Cristiano Ronaldo has scored over 160 official penalties, the highest penalty goalcount in football history.
Cristiano Ronaldo is the leading goalscorer in official football history, exceeding 900 career goals.
